race.comment: BOLD SECRET (1) resumes. He didn't quite fire in two runs last campaign but they were in much stronger races, not far away in a BM70 first up at Moonee Valley despite being a maiden, then tackling a good 3yo race during Cup week at Flemington. Back to maiden grade here, he should be hard to hold out. TASSORTING (6) has made a habit of finding one better, runner up for the fourth time in six starts when resuming at Mornington. He did find the line well there and should strip fitter, expect he goes close. BOLTING BLUE (2) also come through the Kingsbury race when second at a big price, must include off that. MODEL GIGI (10) was okay on debut here and can improve.
